news.t: Value trade comeback? Investor lays out his top plays for the second half of 2020 and beyond

holdings.infoBox: DGRE is an equity ETF with a total of 281 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.76%, Samsung Electronics at 9.60%, SK hynix at 2.10%, MediaTek at 1.98%, and Grupo Mexico SAB de CV Class B at 1.55%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Emerging Markets Quality Dividend Growth Fund (DGRE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of dividend-paying emerging-market stocks with growth characteristics. The fund seeks income and capital appreciation. DGRE was launched on Aug 1, 2013 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: Value trade comeback? Investor lays out his top plays for the second half of 2020 and beyond
data.text: Small caps, emerging market stocks and banks could make for an interesting long-term trade from this point on, says John Davi of Astoria Portfolio Advisors.

data.title: Out of growth, into value? Investor lays out his top trades for the second half of 2020
